title: rhaphiolepis × delacourii
intro: Rhaphiolepis × delacourii, a hybrid plant species derived from Rhaphiolepis indica and Rhaphiolepis umbellata, is a flowering shrub native to China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Rhaphiolepis × delacourii include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and tinctures, are used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
